Secure A1 Exam Mode
A1 Friendly 80-question bank 30 screens evaluated 2 minutes per question Idioms Mega Match: 13 minutes

Idioms + Verb To Be + All About Me

This version is adapted for beginner students (A1). The vocabulary is broader but simpler: family, feelings, classroom objects, daily life, personal information, and basic conversations. Every attempt includes the full idioms matching section, and the other 29 screens are selected randomly from the bank, so the exam changes every time.

80Total bank
30Evaluated screens
20Idioms always included
3Main formats + matching
Fullscreen required Tab switch detection Shortcut blocker Copy/Paste blocker Right click off Auto-submit after incidents
What students will see
  • Multiple choice questions
  • Dropdown completion questions
  • Mini conversations
  • A special idioms mega-match with all the idioms together
  • Automatic move to the next screen when time is over
Important rules
  • Standard timer: 2 minutes per screen
  • Idioms mega-match: 8 minutes
  • If the student leaves the exam, the current screen is marked incorrect
  • Too many incidents = automatic submission
